summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: (1) Formula Locking/Versioning (RN-BF-01), (2) Estabilidades Tab, (3) Tasks Sistema. Found and fixed 4 bugs: useMemo not imported (Estabilidades crash), Dialog not imported (Registrar Leitura crash), MongoDB _id not removed in stability readings (500 error), and tenant_id missing from pd_formulas (new-version 404). All 15 backend tests pass after fixes.

critical.issue: FIXED: Returned 404 'Fórmula não encontrada' because pd_formulas collection did not store tenant_id when formula was created. Query `find_one({'id': ..., 'tenant_id': ...})` always failed. Fixed by adding tenant_id to create_formula() document.
FIXED: Returned 500 'ObjectId not serializable' because reading dict had MongoDB _id field. Fixed by calling reading.pop('_id', None) after insert_one.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: useMemo not imported - React crash when visiting Estabilidades tab. Added useMemo to React imports.
FIXED: Dialog/DialogContent/etc not imported - 'Dialog is not defined' crash when clicking 'Registrar Leitura'. Added Dialog imports from @/components/ui/dialog.

issues: 'Nova Versão' button in header area doesn't open dialog (first button found). Only the 'Nova Versão' button in the locked formula row (v1) opens the dialog correctly. Minor UX issue - header button may be for a different action.

action_items: No remaining bugs - all 4 found issues were fixed by testing agent
INFO: Header 'Nova Versão' button in Manipulação tab (top-right) doesn't open dialog - only the per-formula 'Nova Versão' button does. Investigate if this is expected behavior.
CARRY FORWARD from iter6: Fix canEdit to include formulador/lider_pd/qa roles so they can edit via UI (not just admin/gestor)
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: pd_formulas missing tenant_id field on create - caused new-version endpoint to always 404
FIXED: stability readings missing _id removal - caused 500 on POST readings
FIXED: useMemo missing import in PDDetail.js - crashed Estabilidades tab
FIXED: Dialog components missing import in PDDetail.js - crashed Registrar Leitura flow
Nova Versão button in formula header area (top-right of Manipulação tab) does not open dialog - only the per-formula button works

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features present and functional after fixing 2 missing imports; minor Nova Versão header button non-functional)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ITER7_LockClass, TEST_ITER7_LockV5, TEST_ITER7_Base cards. These are IN_TESTS and IN_PROGRESS status with formulas and locked versions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth uses HttpOnly cookies. pd_formulas now has tenant_id field (fixed). Estabilidades tab works with 9 conditions, 12 parameters, 7 checkpoints. Formula locking flow fully working: add item blocked (RN-BF-01), new version with justification >= 10 chars creates v2. Tasks page has Verificar D-1 (toast on click) and Criar Tarefa (full dialog). Test cards: 78f64746-53e7-4187-bc1e-1cb7e2c9269e (IN_TESTS, LockClass). canEdit still restricted to admin/gestor in PDDetail.js line 95 (from iter6 issue, still open).
rca_of_issues: Bug 1 RCA: create_formula() in pd_routes.py did not include tenant_id in the formula document. create_formula_new_version() queries with tenant_id filter. Fix: add tenant_id to formula dict in create_formula().

Bug 2 RCA: After insert_one(), MongoDB adds _id (ObjectId) to the dict. The endpoint returned the reading dict without removing _id, causing JSON serialization failure. Fix: reading.pop('_id', None) after insert.
Bug 3 RCA: PDDetail.js uses useMemo (line 1232 in EstabilidadesTab) but only imported useState/useEffect/useCallback. Fix: add useMemo to React import.
Bug 4 RCA: PDDetail.js uses Dialog/DialogContent/etc in both FormulaTab (line 1144) and EstabilidadesTab (line 1378) but Dialog was never imported from @/components/ui/dialog. Fix: add Dialog import.
